creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As alan@netassociates.com wrote:

> What do I do in order to have FreeBSD recognize my WD7000-ASC
> SCSI controller card?  It is not recognized by the default 
> kernel.

Write a driver, one would assume?

cheers, J"org
